creator: spe@phear.org
text:
Upgrading to FreeVRRPd 1.1
Bug Correction:
- When freevrrpd runs and create netgraph virtual interface, if the primary interface is not in PROMISC mode, VRRP is not working.
- freevrrpd now pass the primary interface in PROMISC before creating ng_eiface interface and bridge

Fix: Patch attached

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: run FreeVRRPd without setting PROMISC flag on the primary interface
